hero.title: Launch Your Career with Confidence
hero.subtitle: The AUF Career Development Center bridges students and graduates with industry opportunities through job placement, career counseling, and lifelong professional development.

overview.title: Your Career Journey Starts Here
overview.description: The Career Development Center (CDC) at AUF provides comprehensive career readiness programs for students and graduates. We work hand-in-hand with industry partners to connect talent with opportunity — from internship placements to full-time employment.
overview.mission: To prepare every AUF graduate for a meaningful career by equipping them with the skills, networks, and confidence to thrive in a rapidly changing world.

services.title: Career Services for Students & Graduates
services.description: Our comprehensive suite of career services is available to currently enrolled students and recent AUF graduates. All services are provided free of charge.

servicesList.title: Career Counseling
servicesList.description: One-on-one sessions with a career counselor to help you identify your strengths, explore career paths, and set actionable professional goals.

servicesList.title: Resume & CV Review
servicesList.description: Expert feedback on your resume, CV, or application materials to help you present yourself effectively to employers.

servicesList.title: Mock Interviews
servicesList.description: Practice interview skills in a realistic setting with constructive feedback from career counselors and industry professionals.

servicesList.title: Job Referral
servicesList.description: Direct referrals to partner companies actively hiring AUF graduates. We match your skills and interests with open positions across industries.

servicesList.title: OJT & Internship Placement
servicesList.description: Assistance in finding and securing on-the-job training and internship positions aligned with your degree program requirements.

servicesList.title: Certification Programs
servicesList.description: Access to short-term professional certification programs offered in partnership with leading industry organizations.

resources.title: Career Development Resources
resources.description: Download templates, guides, and checklists to help you build your application materials, prepare for interviews, and navigate your job search.

partners.title: Our Industry Partners
partners.description: AUF collaborates with companies and organizations across the Philippines and abroad who actively recruit our graduates. Our partnerships span all major industries.
partners.partnershipNote: Interested in hiring AUF graduates? Contact our Career Development Center to explore partnership opportunities and campus recruitment arrangements.

openings.title: Current Job & OJT Openings
openings.description: Browse active job postings and OJT openings from our partner companies. All listings are verified by the Career Development Center. Updated regularly — check back often.

listings.title: Secondary School Teacher
listings.company: DepEd Schools Division of Angeles City

openings.submissionNote: Companies wishing to post job or OJT openings may submit listings to the Career Development Center for review and posting.
openings.submissionContactNote: Send listings to cdc@auf.edu.ph with the subject line "Job Posting Request".

events.title: Career Events & Job Fairs
events.description: Attend our regular career events to meet employers, sharpen your professional skills, and expand your professional network.

upcomingEvents.title: AUF Annual Job Fair
upcomingEvents.description: Meet recruiters from 50+ companies across all industries. Bring your resume, dress professionally, and be ready to network.

upcomingEvents.title: Resume Writing Workshop
upcomingEvents.description: A hands-on workshop covering resume structure, tailoring applications to specific roles, and the most common mistakes to avoid.

upcomingEvents.title: Tech Industry Insider Talk
upcomingEvents.description: Hear from IT professionals about emerging roles, high-demand skills, and navigating a career in technology.

upcomingEvents.title: Healthcare Career Forum
upcomingEvents.description: Discussions on board exam preparation, local and abroad employment, and licensure updates for health science graduates.

contact.title: Contact the Career Development Center
contact.description: Our team is ready to help you navigate your career journey. Whether you're a student looking for your first job or an employer looking to recruit AUF graduates, we're here to connect you.

office.name: Career Development Center
office.campus: AUF Main Campus, MacArthur Highway, Angeles City

forStudents.title: For Students & Graduates
steps: Visit the CDC office or email us to schedule an appointment
Bring a copy of your resume and transcript of records
Share your area of interest and preferred employment type
Our counselors will match you with relevant openings and guide you through the process

forEmployers.title: For Employers & Partners
steps: Contact us by email or phone to discuss your hiring or OJT needs
We will coordinate a campus recruitment schedule or referral arrangement
Submit job descriptions and requirements to the CDC for screening
Choose from job fair participation, referral lists, or direct campus coordination
